Service Agreement
This agreement is made between Party A and Party B.

Effective date: January 1, 2026
Term: 24 months

Obligations
The vendor shall provide support services, corrective maintenance, and periodic reporting.
Each party is responsible for confidentiality and compliance with security requirements.

Terms and conditions
The contract defines liability limits, breach handling, and termination rights.
Failure to meet obligations may trigger penalties and compensation clauses.

Termination
Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice under the contract terms.
